message:
test: add cycle algorithms fuzz target

Adds structure-aware fuzzer for cycle-related algorithms:
- simple_cycles (Johnson's algorithm)
- find_cycle (directed and undirected)
- cycle_basis
- Eulerian path checks (has_eulerian_path, is_eulerian, is_semieulerian)

Uses small graphs (max 12 nodes) for simple_cycles to avoid
combinatorial explosion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -130,3 +130,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_random_generators"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_random_generators.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_cycles"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_cycles.rs"
+doc = false
